items.title: Are US and Iran close to peace or sliding back to war?
items.summary: Neither side seems interested in a return to all-out conflict, despite the latest exchange of strikes.

items.title: US justice department launches criminal investigation into Trump accuser E Jean Carroll
items.summary: The case centres on whether the former columnist lied about the funding she received for her civil lawsuit against the US president.

items.title: VIDEO Blizu Turske napadnuta tri ruska tankera "flote iz sjene"
items.summary: UKRAJINSKI dronovi napali su tri tankera ruske "flote iz sjene" u Crnom moru, tvrdeći da su služili za izbjegavanje sankcija.

items.title: VIDEO Rusija postavlja nove sustave Pancir na krovove zgrada u Moskvi
items.summary: RUSIJA postavlja nove protuzračne sustave Pancir-SMD-E na krovove u Moskvi kao odgovor na pojačane ukrajinske napade dronovima. Novi sustav je specijaliziran za borbu protiv manjih zračnih ciljeva.

items.title: Questions over safety as 16 pupils die in another Kenya school fire
items.summary: Several parents were still waiting for news of their children roughly 12 hours after the fire.

items.title: Man arrested after three injured in stabbing at Swiss train station
items.summary: A 31-year-old Swiss man has been arrested, police say, as images from the scene show parts of the station cordoned off.

items.title: Fire kills 16 students at Kenyan girls’ boarding school
items.summary: At least 16 students were killed and dozens injured after a fire tore through the dormitory of a girls’ school in Kenya.

items.title: Tri osobe ozlijeđene u napadu u Švicarskoj. Policija: Riječ je o terorizmu
items.summary: ŠVICARSKA policija proglasila je napad nožem u Winterthuru terorističkim činom, a uhićeni napadač ranije je širio ISIS propagandu.

items.title: WHO chief heads to ‘hardest hit’ Ituri as DRC’s 17th Ebola outbreak spreads
items.summary: DRC battles Bundibugyo strain as confirmed cases rise to 121, with 17 deaths and 246 suspected fatalities reported.

items.title: Gaza City hospitals say several killed in strike, as Israel targets Hamas leaders
items.summary: At least five children were reportedly killed in the strike, which appears to have targeted a Hamas commander.

items.title: Netanyahu naredio vojsci da preuzme kontrolu nad 70 posto Gaze
items.summary: IZRAELSKI premijer Netanyahu naredio je vojsci preuzimanje 70% Gaze, šireći kontrolu sa 60%. Hamas optužuje Izrael za kršenje primirja iz 2025. i potkopavanje napora za smirivanje napetosti.

items.title: Israel hits Lebanese capital in 'targeted strike'
items.summary: Beirut had until now largely been spared even as both Israel and Hezbollah accused each other of breaking last month's ceasefire.

items.title: Iran says it targeted American base after fresh US strikes
items.summary: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.

items.title: US, Mexico, Canada announce Ebola-related travel measures for World Cup
items.summary: World Cup hosts agree steps to counter Ebola threat after WHO declares public health emergency ​of international concern

items.title: US Treasury threatens Oman with sanctions over Hormuz Strait
items.summary: US official says Oman should know that Washington 'will aggressively target' actors that facilitate tolls in waterway.

items.title: Talijani razbili mafijašku mrežu, u Zagrebu uhićen hrvatski dobavljač oružja
items.summary: TALIJANSKA policija u Salernu razbila je međunarodnu kriminalnu organizaciju. Izdane su mjere za 23 osobe zbog droge, iznuda i uvoza oružja iz Hrvatske, uz suradnju s USKOK-om.

items.title: Neymar set to miss Brazil World Cup opener due to calf injury
items.summary: Neymar was injured playing for Santos in the Brazil domestic league, and is now confirmed to miss World Cup friendlies.

items.title: NATO naoružava otok u Europi
items.summary: NATO i Švedska užurbano utvrđuju otok koji vide kao ključnu točku obrane Baltika od Rusije. U tijeku su vježbe.

items.title: IOC chief Coventry stirs social media storm over athlete payment comments
items.summary: Olympians slam the IOC chief and Zimbabwe's former medallist for saying athletes should not be paid at the Games.

items.title: Yemen’s former leader Abd-Rabbu Mansour Hadi dies in exile at 80
items.summary: Hadi was the internationally recognised president of Yemen who led a fractured government mostly from exile.
